org.arakhne.neteditor.io.svg

Class SvgGraphics2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.vector.AbstractVectorGraphics2D
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.svg.SvgGraphics2D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorGraphics2D, ViewGraphics2D

    public class SvgGraphics2D
extends AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
    This graphic context permits to create a SVG file from a graphic context.

    The SVG format is specified in W3C.

    The supported specifications are: 1.1.

    Since:
    15.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

    • Method Detail

      • isShadowDrawing

        public boolean isShadowDrawing()
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Indicates if the drawings are for shadows or not.
        Returns:
        true if the drawings are for shadows, false otherwise.

      • getShadowTranslationX

        public float getShadowTranslationX()
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Replies the translation to apply along the X axis to draw the shadow of a figure.
        Returns:
        the translation along X for the shadow from the figures.

      • getShadowTranslationY

        public float getShadowTranslationY()
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Replies the translation to apply along the Y axis to draw the shadow of a figure.
        Returns:
        the translation along Y for the shadow from the figures.

      • getNamespace

        public String getNamespace()
        Replies the namespace to appand to all the generated SVG tags.
        Returns:
        the namespapce to append to.

      • setNamespace

        public void setNamespace(String ns)
        Set the namespace to appand to all the generated SVG tags.
        Parameters:
        ns - is the namespapce to append to.

      • tag

        protected String tag(String tagName)
        Build the name of a SVG tag. This function append the namespace replied by getNamespace() to the given tag name.
        Parameters:
        tagName -
        Returns:
        the complete tag name.

      • prolog

        public void prolog()
        Invoked to export the prolog for the target format. This function should be overridden by subclasses to export a prolog into the target document.
